preview_js:
let selectedListId = '1'; let searchTerm = ''; let questionLists = [{ listId: '1', listName: 'Technical Skills Assessment', description: 'Comprehensive assessment of technical competencies and problem-solving abilities.', totalQuestions: 8, activeQuestions: 6, totalPossiblePoints: 45, dealbreakerCount: 2, isActive: true, questions: [{ questionId: 'q1', questionText: 'Describe your experience with JavaScript frameworks', questionOrder: 1, scoreValue: 5, pointEarningAnswer: 'Both', isDealbreaker: false, dealbreakerValue: null, isActive: true }, { questionId: 'q2', questionText: 'Rate your SQL proficiency level', questionOrder: 2, scoreValue: 3, pointEarningAnswer: 'Yes', isDealbreaker: true, dealbreakerValue: 'No', isActive: true }, { questionId: 'q3', questionText: 'Explain your approach to debugging complex issues', questionOrder: 3, scoreValue: 4, pointEarningAnswer: 'Both', isDealbreaker: false, dealbreakerValue: null, isActive: false }] }, { listId: '2', listName: 'Cultural Fit Evaluation', description: 'Assessment of cultural alignment and team collaboration skills.', totalQuestions: 5, activeQuestions: 3, totalPossiblePoints: 25, dealbreakerCount: 1, isActive: false, questions: [] }, { listId: '3', listName: 'Leadership Assessment', description: 'Evaluation of leadership potential and management capabilities.', totalQuestions: 12, activeQuestions: 10, totalPossiblePoints: 60, dealbreakerCount: 3, isActive: true, questions: [] }]; function handleSearchChange(event) { searchTerm = event.target.value.toLowerCase(); filterLists(); } function filterLists() { const container = document.getElementById('list-container'); const items = container.querySelectorAll('.list-item'); items.forEach(item => { const listId = item.dataset.listId; const list = questionLists.find(l => l.listId === listId); const matches = !searchTerm || list.listName.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm) || (list.description && list.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)); item.style.display = matches ? 'block' : 'none'; }); } function handleSelectList(event) { const listId = event.currentTarget.dataset.listId; selectedListId = listId; document.querySelectorAll('.list-item').forEach(item => { item.classList.remove('selected'); }); event.currentTarget.classList.add('selected'); updateDetailPanel(); } function updateDetailPanel() { const selectedList = questionLists.find(l => l.listId === selectedListId); if (!selectedList) return; const detailPanel = document.getElementById('detail-panel'); const title = detailPanel.querySelector('.slds-page-header__title'); const meta = detailPanel.querySelector('.slds-page-header__name-meta'); const description = detailPanel.querySelector('.slds-p-horizontal_medium p'); title.textContent = selectedList.listName; meta.textContent = `${selectedList.activeQuestions} of ${selectedList.totalQuestions} questions active | ${selectedList.totalPossiblePoints} total points | ${selectedList.dealbreakerCount} dealbreakers`; if (description) { description.textContent = selectedList.description || ''; } updateQuestionsTable(); } function updateQuestionsTable() { const selectedList = questionLists.find(l => l.listId === selectedListId); if (!selectedList) return; const tbody = document.querySelector('.slds-table tbody'); tbody.innerHTML = ''; selectedList.questions.forEach(question => { const row = document.createElement('tr'); row.innerHTML = `${question.questionOrder}
${question.questionText}
${question.scoreValue}
${question.pointEarningAnswer}
${question.isDealbreaker ? `${question.dealbreakerValue}` : '—'}${question.isActive ? '' : ''}
`; tbody.appendChild(row); }); } function toggleActionsMenu() { const menu = document.getElementById('actions-menu'); menu.style.display = menu.style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none'; } function handleNewList() { document.getElementById('list-modal-title').textContent = 'New Question List'; document.getElementById('list-name').value = ''; document.getElementById('list-description').value = ''; document.getElementById('list-active').checked = true; showModal('list-modal'); } function handleEditList() { const selectedList = questionLists.find(l => l.listId === selectedListId); if (!selectedList) return; document.getElementById('list-modal-title').textContent = 'Edit Question List'; document.getElementById('list-name').value = selectedList.listName; document.getElementById('list-description').value = selectedList.description || ''; document.getElementById('list-active').checked = selectedList.isActive; showModal('list-modal'); } function handleCloneList() { const selectedList = questionLists.find(l => l.listId === selectedListId); if (!selectedList) return; document.getElementById('clone-name').value = `${selectedList.listName} (Copy)`; showModal('clone-modal'); } function handleDeleteList() { const selectedList = questionLists.find(l => l.listId === selectedListId); if (!selectedList) return; if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete "${selectedList.listName}" and all its questions?`)) { alert('List deleted successfully!'); } } function handleActivateAll() { alert('All questions activated successfully!'); } function handleDeactivateAll() { alert('All questions deactivated successfully!'); } function handleNewQuestion() { document.getElementById('question-modal-title').textContent = 'New Question'; document.getElementById('question-text').value = ''; document.getElementById('question-order').value = ''; document.getElementById('score-value').value = '1'; document.getElementById('point-earning-answer').value = 'Both'; document.getElementById('is-dealbreaker').checked = false; document.getElementById('dealbreaker-value').value = ''; document.getElementById('question-active').checked = true; toggleDealbreakerField(); showModal('question-modal'); } function handleEditQuestion(event) { const questionId = event.currentTarget.dataset.questionId; const selectedList = questionLists.find(l => l.listId === selectedListId); const question = selectedList.questions.find(q => q.questionId === questionId); if (!question) return; document.getElementById('question-modal-title').textContent = 'Edit Question'; document.getElementById('question-text').value = question.questionText; document.getElementById('question-order').value = question.questionOrder; document.getElementById('score-value').value = question.scoreValue; document.getElementById('point-earning-answer').value = question.pointEarningAnswer; document.getElementById('is-dealbreaker').checked = question.isDealbreaker; document.getElementById('dealbreaker-value').value = question.dealbreakerValue || ''; document.getElementById('question-active').checked = question.isActive; toggleDealbreakerField(); showModal('question-modal'); } function handleDeleteQuestion(event) { const questionId = event.currentTarget.dataset.questionId; const selectedList = questionLists.find(l => l.listId === selectedListId); const question = selectedList.questions.find(q => q.questionId === questionId); if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete "${question.questionText}"?`)) { alert('Question deleted successfully!'); } } function handleSaveList() { alert('List saved successfully!'); hideModal('list-modal'); } function handleSaveQuestion() { alert('Question saved successfully!'); hideModal('question-modal'); } function handleSaveClone() { alert('List cloned successfully!'); hideModal('clone-modal'); } function handleCloseListModal() { hideModal('list-modal'); } function handleCloseQuestionModal() { hideModal('question-modal'); } function handleCloseCloneModal() { hideModal('clone-modal'); } function showModal(modalId) { document.getElementById(modalId).style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById(modalId + '-backdrop').style.display = 'block'; } function hideModal(modalId) { document.getElementById(modalId).style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById(modalId + '-backdrop').style.display = 'none'; } function toggleDealbreakerField() { const isDealbreaker = document.getElementById('is-dealbreaker').checked; const container = document.getElementById('dealbreaker-value-container'); container.style.display = isDealbreaker ? 'block' : 'none'; } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { updateDetailPanel(); document.getElementById('is-dealbreaker').addEventListener('change', toggleDealbreakerField); document.addEventListener('click', function(event) { const actionsMenu = document.getElementById('actions-menu'); if (!event.target.closest('.slds-dropdown-trigger')) { actionsMenu.style.display = 'none'; } }); });
preview_css: .list-panel { min-height: 600px; max-height: 80vh; overflow-y: auto; } .detail-panel { min-height: 600px; } .list-container { max-height: calc(80vh - 200px); overflow-y: auto; } .list-item { cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(221, 219, 218); transition: background-color 0.2s ease; } .list-item:hover { background-color: rgb(243, 242, 242); } .list-item.selected { background-color: rgb(0, 112, 210); color: white; } .list-item.selected .slds-text-color_weak { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .dealbreaker-badge { background-color: rgb(254, 184, 171); color: rgb(194, 57, 52); } .slds-table td { vertical-align: middle; } .slds-table tbody tr:hover { background-color: rgb(250, 250, 249); } .slds-modal__content { max-height: 60vh; overflow-y: auto; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .list-panel, .detail-panel { min-height: 400px; } .list-container { max-height: 400px; } } .list-container::-webkit-scrollbar, .slds-modal__content::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; } .list-container::-webkit-scrollbar-track, .slds-modal__content::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: rgb(243, 242, 242); } .list-container::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb, .slds-modal__content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgb(201, 199, 197); border-radius: 4px; } .list-container::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover, .slds-modal__content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: rgb(150, 148, 146); }
